Contact 🇧🇷PT

Cybersecurity Services

360° Portfolio in DevOps, AppSec, Data Protection, and GRC. From implementation to operation and evidence for LGPD, NIST, PCI, and ISO 27001, including vendor and third-party assessment.



DevSecOps Acceleration Program

Get the most without switching your stack. CI/CD, SAST, DAST, SCA, IaC, and secrets prioritized by risk, blocking, and auto-fix in the developer workflow.

Managed Secure Development

Continuously reduce vulnerabilities. Scans, triage, and developer guidance with SLAs and executive dashboards.

Pentest & Security Testing

Discover real risks before the attacker. Web, APIs, mobile, and cloud with controlled exploitation, evidence, and retest (LGPD/ISO/PCI).

Data Protection & Encryption

Protect sensitive data and comply with LGPD. Discovery, consent/cookies, KMS/HSM encryption, tokenization, and hardening.

Governance, Risk, and Compliance (GRC)

Gain compliance without friction. Assessment, inventories, risk evaluation, policies, and audit trails (LGPD/GDPR/ISO/PCI/NIST).

Evernow Managed Services

Sleep soundly with 24x7 operation. SLAs, runbooks, SOC/SIEM, vulnerability response, and compliance reports.

What we do?

Four fronts to shield your business in digital security

We integrate security throughout the software lifecycle, from planning to deployment.

Our DevSecOps model accelerates application delivery by automating tests, anticipating the identification and correction of vulnerabilities in modeling, and ensuring continuous compliance.

We combine clear metrics and agile practices to make security a natural part of development, without compromising business speed.

We offer continuous security with active monitoring and specialized management.

Through managed services and SaaS solutions, we offer 24/7 protection against threats, reducing operational costs and freeing your team to focus on innovation.

Our approach unifies visibility, automation, and agile response, keeping the environment always secure, up-to-date, and in compliance.

Choose the right solutions and maximize the return on your security investments.

We support everything from market analysis to implementation, adjustment, and operation of tools, ensuring alignment with the company's strategic goals.

With practical expertise, we help reduce redundancies, optimize costs, and increase efficiency, so that each technology brings its maximum potential, delivering real and measurable value.

Anticipate risks before they become real incidents.

We perform pentests, assessments, and complete audits to identify vulnerabilities, validate controls, and strengthen your company's cyber resilience.

Our reports prioritize clarity and impact, helping leaders make fast and assertive decisions to protect data, processes, and reputation.

Ready to start?

Choose the model that best fits your business: 40h, 80h plans, or dedicated professionals.
Total flexibility to accelerate results with security.

Talk to a specialist
Join the clients who trust Evernow

We protect companies with cybersecurity and DevSecOps solutions, combining technology and experts to generate trust, efficiency and secure growth.
